# Hermetic sidebar-scan-proof fixture (ACP-2)

`proof_class: hermetic` — consumed by `netease.playlist.sidebarScanProof` tests and invoke.

Directory must contain `playlist-sidebar-scan.json` (not scan-frame PNG fixtures).

Provenance: baseline shape from `recording.rs` `minimal_scan_json()` with app context enriched for hermetic proof.
